title: React Developer
description: Build and maintain React.js frontend applications.
requirements: 2+ years React experience. Strong CSS and JavaScript skills.

title: Node.js Backend Developer
description: Build REST APIs using Node.js and Express with MongoDB.
requirements: 2+ years Node.js experience. MongoDB and REST API knowledge.

title: UI/UX Designer
description: Design user interfaces for web and mobile applications.
requirements: 3+ years UI/UX experience. Proficient in Figma and Adobe XD.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Manage cloud infrastructure and CI/CD pipelines.
requirements: 2+ years DevOps experience. AWS, Docker, Jenkins knowledge.

title: Remote Frontend Developer
description: Work remotely building React frontends for international clients.
requirements: 2+ years React experience. Strong communication skills.
